component.name: Teams Lite for Linux
component.summary: Teams Lite for Linux — unofficial Microsoft Teams client

description.p: A native Microsoft Teams client for Linux built with CEF (Chromium Embedded Framework). Features native Wayland support, HiDPI scaling, system tray integration, and cookie-based session persistence.
Initial release with native Wayland, HiDPI, OAuth login, system tray, and screen sharing.
